name: Chocolate 20 Minute Cake (Sheet Cake)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease an 8x8 inch baking pan with butter or Crisco.
3. In a large bowl, mix together sugar, flour, salt, cocoa powder, baking soda, and vanilla extract until well combined.
4. Add water and buttermilk to the dry ingredients, stirring until just combined. Do not overmix; lumps are okay.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from oven and let cool in the pan for about 10 minutes before turning off the heat and removing the cake from the pan.
